title: test_coverage=0.8 — some tests failed
evidence: retort.db test_coverage=0.8 (1.0 = all pass, 0.0 = none ran). Tests executed but ~20% of coverage/assertions were not satisfied.
suggestion: Investigate which test cases fail — likely edge cases in BDD scenarios or sample question assertions against live data.

title: code_quality=0.833 — minor lint issues
evidence: retort.db code_quality=0.833. Source uses long docstrings and some style inconsistencies.
suggestion: Run ruff/flake8 to identify and fix remaining warnings.

title: maintainability=0.605 — below average maintainability score
evidence: retort.db maintainability=0.605. data_loader.py (475 lines) and queries.py (597 lines) are large single-module files with complex normalisation logic.
suggestion: Consider splitting data_loader.py normalisation helpers and per-file loaders into separate modules.

title: idiomatic=0.7 — moderately idiomatic Python
evidence: retort.db idiomatic=0.7. Heavy use of Optional[str] instead of str | None (Python 3.10+), and some verbose dict-building patterns.
suggestion: Adopt PEP 604 union types and dataclass-based return types for cleaner API.
